ai_summary: Navkar Corporation Limited's unaudited results for the quarter ended June 30, 2026, indicate a robust year-over-year performance, with revenue growing 38% and net profit soaring over 400% compared to the same period last year. Although the company experienced a sequential dip in revenue and net profit from the prior quarter, the substantial annual growth is the key positive takeaway, and the statutory auditors issued an unmodified limited review report with no material red flags identified.
